name: Ternary Koopman-Attention Hybrid (TKA-H) v5
blurb: Pareto-optimal hybrid reasoner alternating 4 Attention and 4 Koopman-SSM layers using Shared-Block Recurrence (2 unique blocks tiled across depth). Employs an 8-stage convergence stack including 3-Phase Curriculum Sequencer (256->1024), Stochastic Depth (0.1), Ternary Noise Injection (0.02), and Self-Distillation KL-anchoring. Features EngramHash v2, EMA shadow weights (start@40%), NeoMuon with tuned LR (0.03/matrix, 0.045/embed), fast curriculum (15/40 phase split), and shortened warmdown (35%). Tuned via systematic 15-min ablation sweep across curriculum timing, LR, and noise.
